overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative horror game, showing a character exploring a foggy coastal fishing dock and adjacent street. The scene features muted desaturated colors, wooden architecture, and atmospheric fog with a lighthouse visible in the distance. The character walks along the waterfront, passes through an industrial area, and interacts with an NPC at a campaign table.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy fishing dock with wooden railings and moored boats

events.description: character stops briefly at railing to look at fishing boat in the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy wooden dock, pausing briefly to observe a boat in the water before continuing

notable_agents.action: fisherman leaning on railing looking out at the water
fisherman fishing over the railing with a rod

entered.detail: weathered wooden railing lining the edge of the dock
small boat floating in the foggy water near the dock
tall lighthouse atop a rocky outcrop visible through heavy fog
green fishing nets piled on the dock
small wooden fishing shack with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy wooden fishing dock lined with railings. Two fishermen stand by the water's edge, one fishing with a rod. Through the thick fog, a lighthouse is visible atop a distant rocky outcrop. The character pauses briefly to look at a small boat floating in the water before continuing along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with fishing shacks and equipment

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past wooden fishing shacks and equipment

entered.detail: wooden bulletin board with papers pinned to the wall of the shack
large blue plastic storage containers stacked near the dock edge
red and white life preserver ring mounted on the shack wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the wooden dock, passing by a wooden fishing shack with a bulletin board and life preserver on its wall. Blue storage containers sit stacked to the left. The fishing boat and nets from the previous section are now behind, while the lighthouse remains visible in the distant fog to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront street with storage buildings

events.description: exits wooden dock and enters paved street area with industrial buildings and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial area toward the street, passing large storage containers and parked cars

entered.detail: two-story industrial building with weathered siding and large garage door
dark sedan parked along the side of the building
wooden utility pole with street light and wires
sign reading FRESH FISH on the industrial building facade

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden dock onto a paved street in an industrial waterfront area. A large two-story industrial building with a FRESH FISH sign dominates the view ahead, with a dark sedan parked alongside it. The wooden dock structures fall behind as the character moves deeper into the industrial zone, and the lighthouse fades into the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under building awning with campaign table

events.description: moves under building awning, lighting becomes darker and more enclosed
approaches and interacts with NPC at campaign table, dialogue subtitles appear on screen

agents.ego_description: approaching a campaign table under a building awning and engaging in conversation with the vendor

notable_agents.action: standing at campaign table holding a cup, engaging in dialogue with ego character

entered.detail: folding table with campaign materials and sign reading MAYOR SETTLER
green wooden bench on the sidewalk
bicycle leaning against the building wall
overhanging roof providing shelter over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a building awning where the lighting becomes darker and more enclosed. On the sidewalk, a campaign table is set up with a sign for MAYOR SETTLER. A man stands behind the table holding a cup, and as the character approaches, dialogue subtitles appear on screen. A green bench and a bicycle lean against the wall nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a misty, open fishing dock into a claustrophobic industrial street. It begins by following the character along a wooden pier past fishermen and a floating boat, with a distant lighthouse peering through the thick fog. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts past a fishing shack and stacked blue containers before the wooden planks give way to a paved industrial road. The view then opens up to reveal a large building marked with a Fresh Fish sign and a parked sedan, while the lighthouse gradually fades from sight. Finally, the camera moves under a dark building awning, closing in on a campaign table for Mayor Settler where a man stands beside a green bench and a bicycle.
